---
title: "GEO Program Analyst <br>(Data Analyst)"
author: "Dr. Christine Swanson"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: solarized
    auto-stretch: false
knitr:
    opts_chunk:
      dev: svg
      dev.args: {bg: "transparent"}
---

```{r}
source("exploratory_analysis.R")
```

## Background

::::{.columns}
Interdisciplinary scientist at the nexus of:

:::{.column width="30%"}
- remote sensing
- land use and land cover change
- ecology
- hydrology
- statistical modeling
:::

:::{.column width = "70%"}

![Lidar caves](caves.jpg)
:::
::::

## Background

::::::{.columns}
:::::{.column width="40%"}
Ph.D. in Forest Resources and Conservation (funded in part by NASA):

- Impacts of serial dams on floodplain hydrology
- Changes to riparian vegetation because of daming, conversion to pasture
:::::

:::::{.column width="60%"}

:::{layout="[[1],[1,1,1]]"}
![Impacts of hydroelectric damming on floodplains](1-s2.0-S004896972104568X-ga1_lrg.jpg)


![](NASA-Logo-Large.png){width="20%"}
:::
:::::
::::::

## Background

:::::{.columns}
::::{.column width="40%"}

Postdoctoral research at the U.S. Naval Research Laboratory, Remote Sensing Division:

- Soils Lab
- Collaboration with Atmospheric Division
::::

::::{.column width="60%}
![Preparing for a lidar drone flight over the Smithsonian Environmental Research Center](PXL_20230818_165530790.MP.jpg)

![](National_Academies_of_Sciences,_Engineering,_and_Medicine_logo.svg.png){width=30%}
::::

::::::

## Analysis of Awards

- NSF public award search
- GEO
- Awards that **expired** between Jan. 1, 2025 and Jan. 1, 2026

## A Peek at the Dataset

```{r, dev='svg', dev.args=list(bg="transparent")}
library(patchwork)

n_awds_bar
```

## A Peek at the Dataset

```{r, dev='svg', dev.args=list(bg="transparent")}
n_div_bar
```


## Geography of Awards
### Number of awards by jurisdiction
```{r, dev='svg', dev.args=list(bg="transparent")}


n_awds_interactive

```

## Geography of Awards
### Obligated dollars by jurisdiction
```{r, dev='svg', dev.args=list(bg="transparent")}
obs_interactive
```

## Some light thematic analysis
### Term Frequency - Inverse Document Frequency (TF-IDF)

The frequency of a term adjusted for how often it is used across a corpus.

$$W_{\text{term,document}} = tf_{\text{term,document}}log(\dfrac{n_{\text{documents}}}{n_{\text{documents with term}}})$$


## Some light thematic analysis
### Bigram plots by (former) divisions

```{r, dev='svg', dev.args=list(bg="transparent")}
bigram_plot
```

## Bigram Network Graphs

### Earth Sciences
```{r}
ear
```

## Bigram Network Graphs

### Atmsopheric Sciences
```{r}
ags
```

## Award Terminations
### By (Former) Division

```{r}
terminated_bar
```

## Award Termination
### A Geographic Look
```{r}
terminated_girafe
```

## Questions?

::::{.columns}
:::{.column width="50%"}
![Google Scholar](google_scholar_qr.png)
:::

:::{.column width="50%"}
![Github](github_qr.png)
:::
::::
